calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-30-2021 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-30-2021 Continued To Oct-20-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-22-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Dev Patel, 951.272.9144 of Saunders Law Group ofr Plaintiff Dominador Esteban appearing via Court call.
No other appearances.

Discussed. Plaintiff did not give notice that he would be appearing. The Court states that he can not argue.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT YEVA, INC. DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege an actionable wrongdoing. Allegations of wrongdoing re: substitution of trustee and rebuffing attempts to modify a loan on a non-owner occupied property cannot support any of the causes of action alleged. Plaintiff shall have 20 days from notice of entry of order to file an amended complaint. Defendant to prepare order. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-21-2021 Continued To Jul-22-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Dev Patel, 951.272.9114 for Plainitff Dominador Esteban. (Zoom)
No other appearances.

Discussed. The notice of stay. The Court states that the Defendant may not have file a reply possibly due to the notice of stay. The Court indicates that there is no stay.

The Court rules as follows: DEFENDANT YEVA, INC.'S DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is continued July 22, 2021. The Defendant may file a reply five days before the new hearing date. Plaintiff to give notice. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-28-2021 Continued To Jun-21-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT YEVA, INC. DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is continued to June 21, 2021 on Court's own motion. Judge: Vedica Puri; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
